title: Perfectly Poached Italian Sea Bass Stracciatella
description: A silky, crowd-pleasing Italian dish featuring sea bass fillets and a mother sauce base, perfect for special occasions.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil, then reduce heat to 145°F (63°C).
In a separate saucepan, warm the Stracciatella base over low heat, whisking occasionally.
Place the sea bass fillets in the water bath, poach for 8-10 minutes or until cooked through.
Remove the fillets from the water, pat dry with a paper towel, and place on a serving platter.
Strain the Stracciatella base through a fine-mesh sieve into a clean saucepan, pressing on the solids to extract as much liquid as possible, then discard the solids.
Add the Parmesan cheese to the Stracciatella base, whisking until smooth and melted, then season with salt to taste.
Drizzle the olive oil over the sea bass fillets, then spoon the Stracciatella sauce over the top.
Garnish with chopped parsley and a sprinkle of Parmesan cheese, then serve immediately.
Season with lemon juice to taste, then serve.
Serve immediately, garnished with lemon wedges and additional parsley if desired.
